comment: Maps Discord author IDs to per-principal EA partitions and binds each partition to its principal display name and per-EA Anthropic key vault reference (Migration Plan §14.2.4; architecture v2.1 §2.2.4). Each partition lives at state/eas/<partition>/. Unmapped author IDs produce an audit-logged refusal rather than silent default routing (Δ D-015 / Migration Plan §14.2.1). Add Sarah's Discord ID when provisioned; CC will not invent or guess an ID. Schema v2 adds the partitions block; v1 configs (mappings only) are still loaded with empty partition metadata.
